nodes.label: P2.1 synth — effective rank / Fisher ratio / NCC across the grid
nodes.rationale: WALL (len+sq) shows the steepest effective-rank collapse (53->6) yet its Fisher ratio actually rises with depth (up to ~0.09) -- rank-collapse and class-margin are decoupled on synth, unlike CIFAR; NCC for layer+lin/onlineBN+lin HERO cells stays higher (~0.55-0.60) than WALL late in depth.
